creator: perky@python.or.kr
text:
this is python interface to gdchart
(it was committed to graphics/gdchart yesterday)

but, py-gdchart uses gdchart-alpha version
(upper than gdchart port's version)
therefore, this port builds with its own gdchart. :)
(it includes gd also, but I patched to use localbase's)

py-gdchart# make install 
py-gdchart# cd /usr/local/share/examples/py-gdchart
py-gdchart# python test.py

then, you can see cute gdchart examples :)
